arts.ttl: Lloyd Kelly Embraces New Challenge at Juventus
arts.sum: Lloyd Kelly, the latest addition to Juventus' defensive lineup, has expressed his enthusiasm about joining the Italian giants. The English defender, who completed his move from Newcastle United on deadline day, is eager to make his mark in Serie A. arts.ttl: Report: Four players Newcastle can sign for free after deadline day
arts.sum: Newcastle United had a quiet January transfer window, bringing in no signings, but that doesn’t necessarily mean their business is done just yet. Despite being linked with several players, the Magpies didn’t bring in any new signings before the window shut. arts.ttl: Newcastle United unleash shock system change as big Kieran Trippier decision made

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta confirms huge Arsenal decision is imminent as transfer plan explained
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has revealed that Arsenal's search for a new sporting director could be over "relatively quickly" - five months after Edu left the club. “We have the sporting director which is Jason, it’s clear and he’s been since the departure of Edu from day one he has been given full responsibility, all our support from that aspect and what the club wants to do after that is not on me,” said Arteta.

arts.ttl: Is there extra-time and penalties in Newcastle vs Arsenal Carabao Cup semi-final?
arts.sum: Arsenal are busy preparing to face Newcastle United in the second leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final. The Gunners have already had a penalty shootout this season, having lost to Manchester United in the FA Cup third-round tie at the Emirates last month.
